title: Investment Fund Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate investment strategy or operations for a large pool of liquid assets supplied by institutional investors or individual investors.

tasks.text: Manage investment funds to maximize return on client investments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select specific investments or investment mixes for purchase by an investment fund.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor financial or operational performance of individual investments to ensure portfolios meet risk goals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select or direct the execution of trades.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or implement fund investment policies or strategies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform or evaluate research, such as detailed company or industry analyses, to inform financial forecasting, decision making, or valuation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Present investment information, such as product risks, fees, or fund performance statistics.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop, implement, or monitor security valuation policies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with investors to determine investment goals or to discuss investment strategies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend investment briefings or consult financial media to stay abreast of relevant investment markets.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare for and respond to regulatory inquiries.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate the potential of new product developments or market opportunities, according to factors such as business plans, technologies, or market potential.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Hire or evaluate staff.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor regulatory or tax law changes to ensure fund compliance or to capitalize on development opportunities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or direct development of offering documents or marketing materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze acquisitions to ensure conformance with strategic goals or regulatory requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Verify regulatory compliance of transaction reporting.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review offering documents or marketing materials to ensure regulatory compliance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Identify group or individual target investors for a specific fund.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct activities of accounting or operations departments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
